title: Login with valid credentials from auth overlay returns to authenticated builder
description: Verifies a user can open the auth overlay, log in with valid credentials, and return to the builder in an authenticated state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the auth overlay is closed and the builder workspace is accessible as an authenticated user

title: Login with invalid credentials shows an authentication error and remains unauthenticated
description: Verifies invalid login attempts show an authentication error and do not authenticate the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error message is visible
Verify the user remains unauthenticated and cannot access authenticated-only builder features

title: Password recovery request flow can be initiated from auth overlay
description: Verifies a user can trigger password recovery and sees a recovery confirmation state without leaving the builder context.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Trigger password recovery from the auth overlay
Fill a valid email into the recovery email field
Submit the password recovery request
Verify a password recovery request confirmation is visible

title: Switch between login and signup modes within the auth overlay
description: Verifies the auth overlay allows switching between login and signup forms.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Switch to the signup form
Verify the signup form fields are displayed
Switch back to the login form
Verify the login form fields are displayed

title: Auth overlay can be dismissed without authenticating
description: Verifies the user can close the auth overlay and remain on the builder unauthenticated.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Close the auth overlay
Verify the auth overlay is not visible
Verify the builder workspace remains accessible in an unauthenticated state

title: Login form validation prevents submitting with empty required fields
description: Verifies the login form blocks submission when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the auth overlay from the builder
Submit the login form
Verify required field validation errors are visible
Verify the user remains unauthenticated

title: Visual builder workspace loads primary content on /
description: Verifies the main builder workspace loads and shows its primary UI regions.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the visual builder workspace is displayed with a canvas area and builder controls

title: Add a widget to the canvas and edit its properties
description: Verifies a user can add a widget and change its properties via the side panels.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a new widget to the canvas
Select the newly added widget on the canvas
Edit a widget property from the properties side panel using a valid value
Verify the widget updates on the canvas to reflect the changed property

title: Save project after making a change shows a save confirmation
description: Verifies saving after edits produces a visible save confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a new widget to the canvas
Invoke the save action from the workspace controls
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Validation error prevents saving until properties are corrected
description: Verifies invalid widget properties show validation errors and block save until corrected.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a new widget to the canvas
Select the newly added widget on the canvas
Edit a widget property to an invalid value that violates validation rules
Invoke the save action from the workspace controls
Verify a property validation error is visible
Correct the property using a valid value
Invoke the save action from the workspace controls
Verify a save confirmation is visible

title: Navigate builder tools and dialogs from the top bar and sidebars
description: Verifies core builder tools are reachable through the top bar and sidebars and open their corresponding panels/dialogs.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open a builder tool from the top bar
Verify the corresponding tool panel or dialog is visible
Open a builder tool from a sidebar
Verify the corresponding sidebar panel is visible

title: Export action is available from workspace controls
description: Verifies the export workflow can be initiated via workspace actions without relying on file downloads.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a new widget to the canvas
Invoke the export action from the workspace controls
Verify an export output view or export confirmation is visible

title: Add multiple widgets and switch selection updates the properties panel
description: Verifies selecting different widgets updates the editable properties shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Add a first widget to the canvas
Add a second widget to the canvas
Select the first widget
Verify the properties panel shows details for the selected widget
Select the second widget
Verify the properties panel updates to show details for the newly selected widget

title: Shared project viewing routes are not directly navigable due to dynamic token
description: Verifies shared project viewing cannot be tested via static routing because the only route requires a dynamic token parameter.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify there is no static route available to open a shared project without a token parameter
